# Burch Contracting

> Licensed SC general contractor (CLG118679) serving Simpsonville, Mauldin, Fountain Inn, Woodruff, and Gray Court, SC since 1995. Owner: C. Scott Burch. Specializing in garage construction, room additions, deck building, screened porches, home remodeling, and commercial tenant upfits.

## Core service pages

- [Garage Builder in Upstate SC](https://burchcontracting.com/garage-builder): Detached and attached garage construction, workshop garages, and garage apartments. 2-car, 3-car, and custom sizes. Serving Greenville County since 1995.
- [Room Additions](https://burchcontracting.com/room-additions): Master suites, sunrooms, in-law apartments, and family room expansions. Full structural integration with existing home.
- [Deck Building](https://burchcontracting.com/outdoor-living/decks): Custom composite and pressure-treated wood decks. Ground-level and multi-level. Permitting handled.
- [Screened Porches](https://burchcontracting.com/outdoor-living/screened-porches): Aluminum and wood-framed screened porches. Deck conversions available.
- [Home Remodeling](https://burchcontracting.com/remodeling): Kitchen, bathroom, and whole-home renovations across Upstate SC.
- [Commercial Upfits](https://burchcontracting.com/commercial-upfits): Retail, office, and restaurant tenant build-outs. Licensed for commercial work.

## Service areas

- [Areas We Serve](https://burchcontracting.com/areas): Simpsonville SC, Mauldin SC, Fountain Inn SC, Woodruff SC, Gray Court SC, Laurens SC, Greenville SC, Five Forks SC, Clinton SC, Greer SC.
- [Simpsonville SC](https://burchcontracting.com/service-areas/simpsonville): Primary market. Garages, additions, decks, and screened porches for Simpsonville homeowners.

## About & contact

- [About Scott Burch](https://burchcontracting.com/about): Owner biography, license information, and company history since 1995.
- [Request a Free Estimate](https://burchcontracting.com/contact): Phone: (864) 724-4600. Email: estimates@burchcontracting.com. Address: 1095 Water Tank Rd, Gray Court, SC 29645.

- [Project Gallery](https://burchcontracting.com/work): Photos and details of completed garages, additions, decks, and screened porches across Upstate SC.
